result.anchor_clause: The definition of "Unrestricted Subsidiary" is hereby amended and restated, in its entirety, as follows: ""[Unrestricted Subsidiary]" means (i) each Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower listed on Schedule 1.01D as of the Closing Date and (ii) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary."
result.admin_agent: Deutsche Bank AG New York Branch (as administrative agent and collateral agent)
result.collateral_agent: Deutsche Bank AG New York Branch
result.guarantors: Not specified in the provided text (Holdings and Loan Parties referenced but guarantor class not defined here)
result.unrestricted_subsidiary_designation_flex: As amended, "Unrestricted Subsidiary" is limited to (i) each Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower listed on Schedule 1.01D as of the Closing Date and (ii) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary — i.e., the amendment removes forward-looking designation flexibility by fixing the set of Unrestricted Subsidiaries to a closed, Closing Date schedule (plus their own subsidiaries).

lme_vectors.rationale: The amendment restates 'Unrestricted Subsidiary' to a closed list fixed as of the Closing Date, preventing designation of new unrestricted subsidiaries into which material assets/IP could be dropped down.
lme_vectors.basis: Amended definition limits Unrestricted Subsidiaries to those listed on Schedule 1.01D as of the Closing Date and their subsidiaries, eliminating forward designation capacity.
lme_vectors.quote: "Unrestricted Subsidiary" means (i) each Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower listed on Schedule 1.01D as of the Closing Date and (ii) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary.

lme_vectors.rationale: The provided text is a limited waiver and amendment addressing waiver of default remedies and the Unrestricted Subsidiary definition; it is silent on lender voting/sacred rights or priming.
lme_vectors.basis: Text covers only temporary waiver of default-related rights/remedies during the Waiver Period and the amended definition; no pro rata sharing or amendment-voting provisions are excerpted.
lme_vectors.quote: it (i) temporarily waives its right to exercise each and every default-related right and remedy under the Loan Documents

lme_vectors.rationale: No incremental facility, ratio-debt, or MFN provisions appear in the excerpted waiver/amendment text.
lme_vectors.basis: The excerpt concerns waiver of Specified Defaults and the Unrestricted Subsidiary definition only.
lme_vectors.quote: the Borrowers have requested that during the Waiver Period, the Agent and the Lenders ... agree to ... temporarily waive their default-related rights and remedies

lme_vectors.rationale: The waiver expressly requires Loan Parties to continue complying with all limitations, restrictions or prohibitions applicable if a Default exists, which likely tightens restricted-payment capacity during the Waiver Period, but the underlying RP baskets are not set out in the excerpt.
lme_vectors.basis: During the Waiver Period each Loan Party must comply with all limitations/restrictions/prohibitions effective if a Default occurred, but no RP basket sizes are provided in the text.
lme_vectors.quote: each Loan Party shall comply with all limitations, restrictions or prohibitions that would be effective or applicable under the Loan Documents, as modified hereby, if any Default o[ccurred]

D.The
Borrowers have requested that during the Waiver Period, the Agent and the
Lenders (sometimes referred to herein individually as a “” and collectively as
the “”) agree to (i) temporarily waive their default-related
rights and remedies against the Borrowers and the other Loan Parties solely
with respect to the Specified Defaults and (ii) permit
the Borrowers to continue or convert Revolving Credit Loans as Benchmark Rate
Loans, notwithstanding the occurrence of any Specified
Defaults.

E.Subject
to the terms and conditions set forth herein, the Lender Parties have agreed to
(i) temporarily waive their default-related rights
and remedies against the Borrowers and the other Loan Parties solely with
respect to the Specified Defaults and (ii) permit the
Borrowers to continue or convert Revolving Credit Loans as Benchmark Rate
Loans, notwithstanding the occurrence of any Specified Defaults.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration
of the foregoing, the terms, covenants and conditions contained herein and
other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency
of which are hereby acknowledged, the parties hereto agree as follows:

SECTION 1.Amendments to Credit Agreement. The Borrowers, Holdings and the
Lender Parties agree that, effective as of the Waiver Effective Date:

(a)The
definition of “Unrestricted Subsidiary” is hereby amended and restated, in its
entirety, as follows:

““” means (i) each Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower listed on Schedule 1.01D as
of the Closing Date and (ii) any
Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary.”

SECTION 2.Limited and Temporary Waiver; Covenants.

(a)Effective
as of the Waiver Effective Date (as hereinafter defined), the Agent and each
Lender agrees that until the expiration or termination of
the Waiver Period (as defined below), it (i) temporarily waives its right to
exercise each and every default-related right and remedy
under the Loan Documents, as modified hereby, and/or applicable Law, but solely
with respect to any of the Specified Defaults, (ii) temporarily
waives its right to terminate any commitment of the Lenders to make Loans or
any obligation of the L/C Issuers to make L/C Credit Extensions
under the Loan Documents, as modified hereby, but solely as a result of the
Specified Defaults, (iii) temporarily waives any right
to accelerate the Obligations or make any demand for payment under the Loan
Documents, as modified hereby, but solely as a result of
the Specified Defaults, (iv) temporarily waives its right under the Loan
Documents to require that the Borrowers Cash Collateralize
the L/C Obligations solely as a result of the Specified Defaults and (v)
temporarily waives its right under the Loan Documents to
prevent Revolving Credit Loans from being continued or converted as Benchmark
Rate Loans, including under Section 2.02(c) of
the Credit Agreement; provided, however,

(i)each
Loan Party shall comply with all limitations, restrictions or prohibitions that
would be effective or applicable under the Loan Documents,
